hours: Saturday 10:00 AM - 3:00 PM. Sunday closed. Monday 2:00 PM - 7:00 PM. Tuesday-Thursday 11:00 AM - 7:00 PM. Friday 11:00 AM - 6:00 PM.
booking_note: Currently booked via an external Typeform link and a basic contact form -- no live chat or AI booking exists today.
system_prompt_extra: This is a fun, superhero-themed practice (Marvel/DC decor, arcade in the lobby) that serves a lot of Medicaid/CHIP families -- keep the tone warm and a little playful, not corporate. If asked about emergencies, tell them to call (713) 999-6777 directly and still collect name and phone so the team can follow up, especially since they're closed Sundays and don't open until 2pm Mondays.
